textByHash.fe06bfa5ab6064a3d4cd4bc8013785e3d000080f: Ahoy there! Here for a drink? You've picked the right place for it. Steve is thankfully a much better bartender than he was a sailor.
textByHash.149ceaa9e79958384b5d64f0271174b587eb6deb: Indeed there is. Steve fancied himself a pirate, but on his first proper voyage he managed to crash his ship, the Pandemonium, right here.
textByHash.836039019e0b931c1ba050771b1fa419c2958680: He claims it was an unavoidable accident caused by the Storm Tempor, but I heard it was actually because he got distracted by a large flock of angry parrots.
